title: The 10 Highest-Grossing Films of 2025 from Best to Worst – RT Audiences
text:
The 10 highest-grossing films of 2025 ranked by Rotten Tomatoes audience ratings:

Top Performers:

Ne Zha II leads with a 98% audience score (4.9/5), described as a technical and narrative triumph that exceeds expectations.

Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba – The Movie: Infinity Castle – Part 1 ties at 98% (4.8/5), praised for its remarkable animation, epic fight sequences, and seriously emotional moments.

Strong Mid-Range Films:

How to Train Your Dragon (97%, 4.7/5) and F1 (97%, 4.7/5) both impressed audiences. The dragon film was noted for its lovable cast of characters and heartfelt story, while the racing film earned praise for being velociously loud and exceedingly exciting.

Zootopia 2 (95%, 4.7/5) is described as action-fueled, hilarious, heartwarming.

Lower-Rated Entries:

Lilo & Stitch scored 91%, while Avatar: Fire and Ash and Superman each achieved 90%.

A Minecraft Movie (84%) and Jurassic World Rebirth (70%) rounded out the list as the lowest-rated entries among the top 10 grossers.

Key Insight: Despite critical reservations about some films, audience reception remained positive for most 2025 commercial releases, with even the lowest-rated films among the top 10 grossers still achieving respectable audience satisfaction scores.
